---
title: "Search all Reporting Guidelines"
page-layout: full
listing:
    contents: "*/index.qmd"
    type: table
    table-striped: true
    filter-ui: [title, acronym, study-type, clinical-specialty, report-section]
    sort:
        - title
        - acronym
    fields: 
        - acronym
        - title
        - study-design
        - clinical-specialty
        - report-section
    field-display-names: 
      title: "Title"
      acronym: "Acronym"
      study-design: "Study type"
      clinical-specialty: "Clinical area"
      report-section: "Section of report"
---
